name: BB:PortDefinition: Authorized L2R Ports
notes: Defines ports that commonly seen in local to remote traffic.
bb_references: BB:PortDefinition: Authorized L2R Ports on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the destination port is one of the following 80, 443, 25, 22, 53, 123
TD_list: APPLY BB:PortDefinition: Authorized L2R Ports on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
